title: Taxonomy of Proximity Measures in Machine Learning
description: A visual classification of common proximity measures, highlighting their types, key formulas, and primary use cases.
relationships: Euclidean Distance is a specific case of Minkowski Distance
Manhattan Distance is a specific case of Minkowski Distance
Cosine Similarity measures angle between vectors A and B
Jaccard Similarity measures the intersection over union of sets A and B
Hamming Distance counts the differing elements between vectors A and B
